name: stackra/identity-sdk
purpose: Typed Saloon SDK for the Identity service — auth, MFA, sessions, OAuth clients, service accounts, JWKS. Umbrella client built on stackra/api-sdk.
capabilities: JWKS fetch for downstream signature verification
when_to_use: Any service that needs to authenticate a caller, resolve the user record, or handshake into an Application.
when_not_to_use: For in-process operations inside the identity service, use the local module packages (auth, user, mfa) directly.
